name: Hardy Potato Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel and thinly slice potatoes.
2. Cut sausage into half-inch slices; place in a large saucepan and brown on both sides.
3. Add chopped onion to the sausage and cook until wilted.
4. Add potatoes, water, salt, and pepper to the pan.
5. Bring the mixture to a boil.
6. Reduce heat and simmer for 30 minutes.
7. Stir in parsley and continue to simmer for an additional 2 minutes.
